TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Haiduan, title = Haiduan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Haiduan} }

S.FORM: Haiduan Itini i Taitung ko Haiduan Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 892.99 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 817.5 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 74.18 km²), 4,278 ko tamdaw i Haiduan Siyang, 1,090 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 4,032 a tamdaw, pakaala to 94%(Bunun布農族) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun ko sa'alomanay i Taitung. O kasaniyarona 6 ko cun, 15 ko niyaro' i Haiduan Siyang. Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu .
S.PHON: ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan itini i taito~u~uŋ ko~u ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.* km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un***) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i taito~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan sijaŋ. kanaħʦian , kanaɾo~u~uk , b~b~vaʦiŋo~u~uɾ , kamʦiŋ , ko~u~uso~u~uno~u~uki , ħaito~u~uto~u~uan , takino~u~usta , so~u~uɾai-ia* , samo~u~uɾo~u~uħ , to~u~uapo~u~uo~u~u , takimi , ɾikao~u~u-o~u~uan , b~b~vo~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~uɾ , b~vaħo~u~u , ɾito~u~u .
S.FORM: Haiduan Itini i Taitung ko Haiduan Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 892.99 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 817.5 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 74.18 km²), 4,278 ko tamdaw i Haiduan Siyang, 1,090 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 4,032 a tamdaw, pakaala to 94%(Bunun布農族) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun ko sa'alomanay i Taitung. O kasaniyarona 6 ko cun, 15 ko niyaro' i Haiduan Siyang. Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu .
S.PHON: ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan itini i taito~u~uŋ ko~u ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.* km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un***) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i taito~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan sijaŋ. kanaħʦian , kanaɾo~u~uk , b~b~vaʦiŋo~u~uɾ , kamʦiŋ , ko~u~uso~u~uno~u~uki , ħaito~u~uto~u~uan , takino~u~usta , so~u~uɾai-ia* , samo~u~uɾo~u~uħ , to~u~uapo~u~uo~u~u , takimi , ɾikao~u~u-o~u~uan , b~b~vo~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~uɾ , b~vaħo~u~u , ɾito~u~u .
